advert.description: The ad concludes with a shot of children running out of a school building accompanied by the slogan "Better days are built on breakfast" and the Kellogg's logo.
A demonstration of the vacuum cleaners ends with a product lineup shot against a steamy background displaying "BISSELL.co.uk" and the slogan "A New Breed of Clean".
The commercial finishes with a solid blue screen featuring the yellow Lidl logo and the tagline "Big on quality / Lidl on price".
The spot concludes on a bright pink background with large black text stating "save £10 a month" followed by the "giffgaff we're up to good" logo.
The advertisement ends with an establishing shot of a suburban house displaying the "Alzheimer's Society" logo, phone number, and call to action on a blue banner.
The segment shows takeout food service and features the "wagamama Original" logo prominently displayed over a chicken dish on a table.
The streaming service ad concludes with a blue title card showing the white "Paramount+" circular logo and the text "START YOUR FREE TRIAL".
